name: page1_load_printh_event_probe

camera.note: The USB Cam capture script timed out after 124 seconds, so this probe relies on checksum plus serial evidence.

conclusion: The scene builder can now emit page1 page-load event metadata and the TFT patcher accepts it only behind experimental_multi_page_events.
The generated TFT checksum is valid and uploaded successfully to COM36.
Runtime page switching remains healthy: page 1 returns sendme 1 and page 0 returns sendme 0.
The page1 load printh payload was not observed during page 1 -> page 0 transitions, so page-level load scheduling for extra pages is not yet solved.
next_hypotheses: The page event bytes are present but the multi-page mirror/primary records may not point the page-load scheduler at them.
Page-level load for inserted pages may use a post-primary callback layout different from object release events.
An official two-page project with a page1 load printh probe is needed as the next bit-to-bit oracle.
